heading: Lighting at docks and boat launching facilities
label: 403b Lighting at docks and boat launching facilities
text: Whenever the Secretary considers a permit application for a dock or a boat launching facility under , the Secretary shall consider the needs of such facility for lighting from sunset to sunrise to make such facility’s presence known within a reasonable distance.section 403 of this title
notes: “Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see .section 2201 of this title
